visualizations.title: Borrowing Column Subtraction
visualizations.description: Stacked column subtraction illustrating regrouping and borrowing step-by-step.

steps.explanation: Align the decimal points vertically and pad with a trailing zero.
Borrowing from tenths: 0 hundredths becomes 10, and 4 tenths is reduced to 3.
Borrowing from ones: Since 3 tenths < 8 tenths, borrow 1 from the ones column (reducing 15 to 14) to make 13 tenths.
Difference: Perform subtraction in each column and drop the decimal point straight down.

visualizations.title: Regrouping in Subtraction: 5.3 - 1.75
visualizations.description: Watch how borrowing reduces left digits and increases right digits as we subtract from right to left.
